name: electron-native-integrations
title: Electron native integrations and extension transport
description: Port native desktop integrations such as tray, shortcuts, autostart, dialogs, updater, relaunch, and extension WebSocket transport into Electron main process services.
creator: Mabel-WIN
notes: Keep the extension WebSocket host and action protocol stable by default. Any protocol break requires an explicit follow-up ADR and browser-extension migration path.
